events.title: EU Battery Passport Enforcement Deadline Announced
events.description: EU regulators confirmed a 2027 enforcement deadline for battery passport reporting, recycling disclosures, and supplier traceability requirements for EV battery manufacturers.

events.title: FDA Issues Draft Guidance on Medical Device Cybersecurity
events.description: New draft guidance outlines mandatory security documentation and quality system expectations for connected diagnostic and surgical devices.

events.title: FAA Safety Alert Covers Cabin Composite Materials
events.description: A safety alert asks aerospace suppliers to review composite materials used in aircraft cabin systems after a recent incident investigation.
